title: Portfolio CMS Platform
description: Built a production-ready full-stack portfolio CMS (Content Management System) with secure admin authentication, dynamic content management (projects, skills, experience, profile), file uploads (project images and CV), contact email delivery via Nodemailer + Gmail App Password, responsive UI, and Azure deployment with environment-based API configuration.

title: E-Waste Management System
description: Built a full-stack MERN application to manage e-waste collection and recycling operations with role-based access. Implemented finance management modules including citizen payments, truck expenses, and reporting dashboards, along with REST APIs for handling collection workflows.
